summary: Bloomberg's Scarlet Fu puts Katie Greifeld and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Asset Manager PGIM Flips Fed View, Sees Three Hikes This Year
title_cn: 美国资产管理公司 PGIM 颠覆美联储观点，预计今年加息三次
summary: US asset manager PGIM has staked out the fringe view that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates three times this year to put the brakes on the economy — then reverse the hikes in 2027.

title: ETFs Have Never Been More Competitive: Tema's Pot
title_cn: ETF 从未如此具有竞争力：Tema 的锅

title: Oil Sinks as US-Iran Deal Boosts Outlook for Reopening of Hormuz
title_cn: 美伊协议提振霍尔木兹海峡重新开放前景，油价下跌
summary: Oil sank to the lowest since early March after the US and Iran agreed to an interim deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, though shipowners were still hunting for more details before committing to resuming transits.

title: SpaceX Shares Jump in Second Day of Trading After Record IPO
title_cn: 创纪录的首次公开募股后，SpaceX 股价在第二天交易中大幅上涨
summary: Bloomberg's Bailey Lipschultz and David Bauer, head of equity capital markets Americas at JPMorgan, discuss SpaceX's success on the company's second day of trading after a record IPO Friday. Bauer said he sees a real 'investment thesis' driving SpaceX as the company contributes to reindustrializing America with 'new ecosystems' and the emergence of space as an industry.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: May Inflation Data Might Be Peak as US-Iran Make Deal, Says Jason Draho
title_cn: 杰森·德拉霍表示，随着美伊达成协议，通胀数据可能达到峰值
summary: Jason Draho, head of asset allocation at UBS Chief Investment Office, said that even though oil flows and energy prices aren't expect to drop back to normal right after a deal between the US and Iran does into effect, May's inflation print may be the peak for year over year measure. Draho said that as energy prices go lower, inflation will start to level out and then dissipate.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ETF IQ 6/15/2026
title_cn: ETF IQ 2026 年 6 月 15 日
summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: BlackRock Global Fixed Income CIO Rick Rider, Defienace ETFs CIO & Co-Founder Sylvia Jablonski, and TEMA ETFs CEO Maurits Pot. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Jumps After US and Iran Reach Deal to Reopen Hormuz Strait
title_cn: 美国和伊朗达成协议重新开放霍尔木兹海峡后金价上涨
summary: Gold and silver rallied after the US and Iran reached an interim deal to end hostilities and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, easing global inflation fears and potentially tempering expectations for interest-rate hikes.

title: BlackRock’s Rieder Sees ‘Explosive’ Rally as Cash Gets Unlocked
title_cn: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的里德 (Rieder) 预计随着现金的释放，股价将出现“爆炸性”反弹
summary: BlackRock Inc.’s Rick Rieder said the surge in US equities following President Donald Trump’s Iran peace deal announcement reflects investors starting to redeploy the roughly $8 trillion to $9 trillion held in money market funds.

title: US Oil Reserve Hits 43-Year Low as Trump Tries to Limit Iran Fallout
title_cn: 特朗普试图限制伊朗的影响，美国石油储备跌至 43 年来的最低点
summary: Bob McNally, president of Rapidan Energy Group, said that countries across the world are going to up their demand for oil to fill strategic reserves depleted by conflict in Iran and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. McNally said that demand in Asian countries like China will be higher than before, because of the crude 'crash diet' the region was on without access to oil supply chains.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Montreal Transit System REM to Sell Up to C$2 Billion Bonds
title_cn: 蒙特利尔交通系统 REM 将出售高达 20 亿加元的债券
summary: The Réseau express métropolitain (REM), a light rail system in Greater Montreal, is looking to raise as much as C$2 billion ($1.43 million) in a bond sale, according to a spokesperson with CDPQ Infra, confirming an earlier Bloomberg report.

title: Waste Management of Canada Is Selling C$700 Million of Bonds
title_cn: 加拿大废物管理公司正在出售价值 7 亿加元的债券
summary: Waste Management of Canada is selling around C$700 million ($501 million) of notes on Monday, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Fox to Buy Roku at $22 Billion Value in Streaming Video Push
title_cn: Fox 将以 220 亿美元收购 Roku 进军流媒体视频领域
summary:
Fox Corp. agreed to acquire Roku Inc. in a deal valued at about $22 billion including debt, creating a new television juggernaut and marking a big push into ad-supported streaming. 
The deal will blend Fox’s sports, news and entertainment channels, including the free, ad-supported Tubi, with Roku’s streaming platform of more than 100 million subscribers, the companies said in a statement Monday. The acquisition will create the third-largest player in the US television market by share of viewing, spanning broadcast, cable, local and streaming, the companies said.
“This combination will transform the scope of our company into high-growth verticals and yield a step change in our overall growth profile,” Fox Chief Executive Officer Lachlan Murdoch said in the statement.
For more on Fox's acquisition of Roku, Bloomberg Intelligence Analyst on US Media, Geetha Ranganathan, joins Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Intelligence." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Iran Deal Done, Turning Attention Back to Russia at G7
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗协议已完成，G7峰会将注意力转向俄罗斯
summary: Evelyn Farkas, executive director of the McCain Institute, said that the US may incentivize further talks with Iran by unfreezing some assets seized during the course of the conflict after a short-term deal is signed to extend a ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Talking with French President Emmanuel Macron ahead of the G7 summit, President Trump told reporters that his attention is also turning back to Russia and Ukraine now that that short-term deal with Iran is done. Farkas said Russians have never been weaker — militarily, economically, and politically — than they are now. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Said to Allocate $600 Million to European Retail in Blockbuster IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 据称将在重磅 IPO 中向欧洲零售业拨款 6 亿美元
summary: European retail investors bought less than 1% of SpaceX’s record initial public offering, a sliver of the biggest first-time share sale in history.

title: SpaceX Will See Strong Natural Demand: Guild
title_cn: Guild：SpaceX 将看到强劲的自然需求
summary: Robinhood CIO Stephanie Guild discusses the retail demand for SpaceX shares with Bloomberg's Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Companies Rush to Borrow Cash as US-Iran Deal Spurs Bullish Mood
title_cn: 美伊协议刺激看涨情绪，企业纷纷借入现金
summary: US companies looked to raise more than $40 billion of debt in the credit markets on Monday, as they tried to capitalize on investor optimism after the US and Iran reached a tentative agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Nvidia Set to Sell $25 Billion of Bonds, Joining AI Debt Boom
title_cn: Nvidia 将发行 250 亿美元债券，加入人工智能债务热潮
summary: Chipmaking giant Nvidia Corp. is set to raise $25 billion from a high-grade bond sale that received more than three times that amount in demand, underscoring relentless investor appetite for exposure to the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Citadel Securities Warns Higher Rates to Challenge Risk Assets
title_cn: Citadel 证券警告利率上升将挑战风险资产
summary: Risk assets are headed for turbulence as the Federal Reserve edges toward a potential interest-rate hiking cycle and investors grow more discerning about the economic impact of artificial intelligence, according to Citadel Securities.

title: Aluminum Slumps as Iran Peace Deal Softens Blow of Supply Crisis
title_cn: 伊朗和平协议缓解供应危机打击，铝价暴跌
summary: Aluminum slumped to the lowest in more than two months as an interim agreement between the US and Iran laid the groundwork for the resumption of metal shipments through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Oil Reserve Hits 43-Year Low as Trump Aims to Tame Prices
title_cn: 特朗普旨在抑制价格，美国石油储备跌至 43 年来的最低点
summary: The US’s emergency supply of crude oil has fallen to its lowest level since 1983 as the Trump administration moves toward completing its plan to release 172 million barrels to ease surging fuel prices spurred by the war in Iran.

title: Markets Shift Focus From SpaceX to Iran, Fed | Open Interest 6/15/2026
title_cn: 美联储：市场焦点从 SpaceX 转向伊朗未平仓合约 2026 年 6 月 15 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Stocks surge and oil plunges as the US and Iran strike a deal, but key questions remain to be answered. Fox makes a big bet on streaming, buying Roku in a $22 billion deal. On the markets, Infrastructure Capital Advisors CEO Jay Hatfield raises his year-end S&P 500 target to 9,000. Redwire CEO discusses the rapidly expanding space economy following SpaceX's blockbuster debut. Plus, Ivanhoe Electric CEO Taylor Melvin on the outlook for copper as the US-Iran deal removes a key risk for commodity markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ivanhoe Electric CEO on Copper's Tariff Test
title_cn: 艾芬豪电气首席执行官谈铜关税测试
summary: Copper rallies as the U.S. and Iran strike an interim agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, easing a key risk for commodity markets. Ivanhoe Electric CEO Taylor Melvin joins "Bloomberg Open Interest" to discuss the outlook for the metal ahead of President Trump's decision on copper tariffs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Soyoil Slides as Agricultural Markets Eye Interim US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 农产品市场关注美伊临时协议，豆油下跌
summary: Soybean oil futures touched a two-month low, tracking losses in the crude oil market, as traders parsed an interim peace deal between the US and Iran to end a months-long war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Studios in Microsoft’s Xbox Division Brace for Closures
title_cn: 微软 Xbox 部门的工作室准备关闭
summary: The studios, which include Compulsion Games and Double Fine, are in active negotiations with Xbox and may be given the chance to go independent.

title: Rieder Says No Forward Guidance Is a Good Thing
title_cn: 里德表示没有前瞻性指引是一件好事
summary: Rick Rieder, BlackRock global fixed income CIO, says if the new Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh eliminates forward guidance, it will be good for markets. He speaks about how other changes Warsh makes could impact stocks, the state of private credit and where he sees the price of bitcoin heading. He appears on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Disables AI Access for Foreign Nationals | Bloomberg Tech 6/15/2026
title_cn: Anthropic 禁止外国人使用人工智能 |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 15 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down why Anthropic disabled access to its most advanced models for all foreign nationals after a request from the Trump administration. Plus, Nvidia is seeking to raise at least $20 billion from its first corporate bond sale since 2021. And, SpaceX shares throttle up on day 2 of trading, adding to a blockbuster public markets debut on Friday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China's AI Markets Still 'A Source of Funds' Says Citigroup
title_cn: 花旗集团称中国人工智能市场仍是“资金来源”
summary: Alicia Yap, Citi's head of Pan-Asia Internet Research, breaks down where China's tech market stands amid global AI adoption. But despite all this heavy corporate activity, Citigroup warns that global investors are still treating China tech as "a source of funds," with Wall Street dumping local stocks to fund the global AI hardware trade. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Stocks Still Volatile, Says JPMorgan Strategist
title_cn: 摩根大通策略师表示，SpaceX 股票仍然波动
summary: Stephanie Aliaga, JPMorgan Asset Management global market strategist, says to expect SpaceX volatility in the next six months. She also says they are expective some big high-profile AI names, but the IPO markets are still going to be selective. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Capable of Building Orbital Data Centers, Says Former Meta CTO
title_cn: 前 Meta 首席技术官表示 SpaceX 有能力建设轨道数据中心
summary: Mike Schroepfer, former CTO of Meta and founding partner of Gigascale Capital - a venture firm making early-stage bets on companies focused on climate impact - says SpaceX is the only company capable of building orbital data centers. He also shares how ocean data centers are 100x cheaper than orbital ones. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cohere Seeing Inbounds After Washington's Anthropic Scrutiny
title_cn: 在华盛顿的人性审查之后，科赫看到了界外球
summary: Cohere Chief AI Officer Joelle Pineau says Cohere has seen a huge number of inbounds after Anthropic was ordered by the US government to disable access to its most advanced AI platforms for all foreign nationals, with governments and investors alike now seeking non-US models as Washington steps up its AI oversight. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Is Anthropic’s Mythos AI and Why Was It Blocked?
title_cn: Anthropic 的人工智能神话是什么？为什么它被封锁？
summary: Anthropic PBC has said its new artificial intelligence tool, Mythos, is so good at finding vulnerabilities in software and computer systems that it can’t be released to the general public. The AI giant released Mythos to only 200 partner organizations because if a tool this powerful fell into the wrong hands, Anthropic says, it could help attackers more easily steal data or disrupt critical infrastructure.

title: Polymarket Traders Clash Over $345 Million Iran Peace Market
title_cn: Polymarket 交易商争夺价值 3.45 亿美元的伊朗和平市场
summary: A proposed deal to end hostilities between the US and Iran gave equities and bond traders a measure of relief on Monday. It also left prediction markets with a new headache.

title: The Race to Build Data Centers in Space
title_cn: 太空数据中心建设竞赛
summary: “Data centers in space” may sound like science fiction, but as the SpaceX IPO augurs a space boom, tech giants and startups are betting orbital artificial intelligence is the next frontier. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Salesforce to Buy AI Firm That Handles Customer Service
title_cn: Salesforce 将收购处理客户服务的人工智能公司
summary:
Salesforce Inc. has agreed to buy Fin, a firm that develops artificial intelligence-powered customer agents, for about $3.6 billion as the software company works to win new business for enterprise AI.
Fin’s flagship product, AI Agent, handles customer queries via chat, email, WhatsApp, text message, phone and Slack. Bloomberg Intelligence Technology Analyst Anurag Rana joined Paul Sweeney and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Intelligence." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Tech
title_cn: 彭博科技
summary: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fox to Buy Roku at $22 Billion Value in Streaming Video Push
title_cn: Fox 将以 220 亿美元收购 Roku 进军流媒体视频领域
summary: Fox Corp. agreed to acquire Roku Inc. in a deal valued at about $22 billion including debt, creating a new television juggernaut and marking a big push into ad-supported streaming.

title: JPMorgan Traders Turn Bullish on US Stocks Citing Peace Deal
title_cn: 摩根大通交易员因和平协议而看好美国股市
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s trading desk has turned bullish on stocks following optimism that peace in the Middle East is near.

title: Anthropic Set to Meet Trump Officials Over AI Security Concerns
title_cn: Anthropic 将就人工智能安全问题与特朗普官员会面
summary: Anthropic PBC executives are planning to meet with Trump administration officials on Monday to discuss an unprecedented US government directive barring foreign access to the company’s most advanced artificial intelligence models, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Chainguard, Cyber Firms Use AI to Hunt for Open-Source Flaws
title_cn: Chainguard、网络公司使用人工智能寻找开源缺陷
summary: More than two dozen companies including JPMorgan Chase & Co. and an array of cybersecurity firms are collaborating to remedy software flaws spotted by cutting-edge artificial intelligence models.

title: Fox Will Buy Roku In Deal Worth About $22 Billion
title_cn: 福克斯将以价值约 220 亿美元的交易收购 Roku
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence media analyst Geetha Rangananthan says this deal makes a lot of strategic sense because it gives Fox more of a gateway into streaming.  The acquisition will create the third-largest player in the US television market by share of viewing, spanning broadcast, cable, local and streaming, the companies said. She appears on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Industrials Stocks Erase War Selloff, Hit Record on US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 工业股消除战争抛售，美伊协议创历史新高
summary: Shares of large US industrial companies jumped to a record Monday after the US and Iran said an interim peace deal was reached, raising hopes that the energy crisis threatening manufacturers’ and transportation firms’ profits will recede.

title: Nuveen Private Bond Chief Scoops Up AI’s ‘Picks and Shovels’
title_cn: Nuveen 私人债券负责人挖掘人工智能的“镐和铲子”
summary: Data centers and computing chips are all the rage in global credit markets right now, but Nuveen LLC’s Laura Parrott is more excited about the “boring, plain vanilla” infrastructure on the outskirts of AI that will benefit regardless of how the technology pans out.

title: Roku-Fox Deal; Airlines Move Higher | Stock Movers
title_cn: Roku-Fox 交易；航空公司走得更高 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Roku (ROKU) is higher while Fox (FOX) is declining on news Fox agreed to acquire Roku in a deal that values the streaming video platform at about $22 billion including debt.

- United Airlines (UAL) is surging with airlines stocks up around 4% ahead of the open after the U.S. and Iran reached an interim peace deal.

- Coinbase (COIN) and Robinhood (HOOD) are following Bitcoin higher amid broader risk appetite with the US-Iran interim deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Whole Foods Unionization Upheld By US Labor Board
title_cn: 美国劳工委员会支持全食超市成立工会
summary: The US labor board ruled against Whole Foods Market’s objections to a landmark Philadelphia unionization vote, teeing up a likely yearslong legal battle over whether the Amazon.com Inc. grocery chain must collectively bargain with US employees for the first time.

title: Anthropic Shuts Down Mythos Access After US Order
title_cn: Anthropic 在美国命令后关闭 Mythos 访问
summary: The US Commerce Department imposed export controls on June 12 restricting Anthropic from offering its most advanced AI models to foreign nationals. In response, Anthropic announced it would halt access to these models for all users, citing the impracticality of policing usage on a case-by-case basis and noting that many of its employees are foreign nationals who would also be affected. Ed Ludlow has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Looks to Raise $20 Billion in First Bond Sale Since 2021
title_cn: Nvidia 计划自 2021 年以来首次发行债券筹集 200 亿美元
summary: Nvidia is preparing to raise at least $20 billion through its first corporate bond sale since 2021, marketing bonds across seven tranches with maturities ranging from two to thirty years, according to people with direct knowledge of the matter. Ed Ludlow has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prime Radiant Invests $50 Million in Cellares Pre-IPO
title_cn: Prime Radiant 在首次公开募股前向 Cellares 投资 5000 万美元
summary: Upstart private equity firm Prime Radiant Partners is investing $50 million in Cellares, as the biotechnology company making high-tech robots to mass-produce cancer treatments raises money ahead of a potential initial public offering in 2027.

title: Adani, Jabil Alliance to Build AI Data Center Gear in India
title_cn: 阿达尼、捷普联盟将在印度建设人工智能数据中心设备
summary: Billionaire Gautam Adani’s group has partnered with American engineering company Jabil Inc. to manufacture AI data center equipment in India as it seeks to capitalize on the country’s artificial intelligence buildout.

title: Inside the Race to Build a Compute Futures Market Bigger Than Oil
title_cn: 打造比石油更大的计算期货市场的竞赛
summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Compute Exchange and Silicon Data CEO Carmen Li tells Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway about her company's quest to build a compute market that could become bigger than oil and what goes into constructing a GPU index. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kalshi Builds AI Agent to Stress-Test Prediction Market Bets
title_cn: Kalshi 构建 AI 代理来对预测市场赌注进行压力测试
summary: Kalshi Inc. has developed its own AI agent to help deal with a number of internal processes, including some of the thorniest issues it faces around the wording of its prediction market contracts.

title: Salesforce to Buy AI Customer Service Firm Fin for $3.6 Billion
title_cn: Salesforce 将以 36 亿美元收购 AI 客户服务公司 Fin
summary: Salesforce Inc. has agreed to buy Fin, a firm that develops artificial intelligence-powered customer agents, for about $3.6 billion as the software company works to win new business for enterprise AI.

title: US B-52 Bomber Crashes in California Shortly After Takeoff
title_cn: 美国 B-52 轰炸机起飞后不久在加利福尼亚坠毁
summary: A US Air Force B-52 Stratofortress bomber crashed shortly after takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base in California, the Pentagon said.

title: Newsom Accuses Trump of Ordering DOJ to Investigate Him, Wife
title_cn: 纽瑟姆指责特朗普命令司法部调查他，妻子
summary: California Governor Gavin Newsom accused President Donald Trump of ordering the US Department of Justice to investigate him and his wife, Jennifer Siebel Newsom.

title: US Government Orders Anthropic to Disable Foreign Access to Mythos
title_cn: 美国政府命令 Anthropic 禁止外国访问神话
summary: Bloomberg's Maggie Eastland breaks down what's at stake as Anthropic shut down its Mythos Fable 5 model after the US government issued a directive blocking foreign nationals from accessing the artificial intelligence tool.  Eastland said that what was pitched as a voluntary AI security program by Trump administration, now seems to leave Anthropic with no choice but to comply with government directives. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, Iran Reach Hormuz Deal | Balance of Power 6/15/2026
title_cn: 美国与伊朗达成霍尔木兹协议 |权力平衡 6/15/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Kailey Leinz discusses the latest news from the Middle East. On today's show, McCain Institute Executive Director Evelyn Farkas, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Rapidan Energy Group President Bob McNally. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Netanyahu Pays a Political Price for Trump’s Iran Deal
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡为特朗普的伊朗协议付出政治代价
summary: Benjamin Netanyahu has staked his political future on his ironclad relationship with Donald Trump — but that’s become a liability now that the US president has cut a deal with Iran that much of Israel opposes.

title: Bolsonaro Says Ex-Caixa CEO to Join Campaign as Economic Adviser
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗称前储蓄银行首席执行官将作为经济顾问加入竞选活动
summary: Brazil presidential candidate Flávio Bolsonaro said the former head of Caixa Economica Federal is joining his campaign as an economic adviser, fueling expectations that she could become finance minister if he is elected.

title: Trump at G7 Hails Iran Deal Even as Divisions With Tehran Remain
title_cn: 特朗普在七国集团峰会上赞扬伊朗协议，尽管与德黑兰仍然存在分歧
summary: The White House sought to make the case that its interim deal with Iran will end a global energy crisis and achieve the administration’s wartime goals, even as the two adversaries diverged on what the agreement will look like.

title: US at Odds With Allies Over How Easy It Is to Reopen Hormuz
title_cn: 美国与盟友就重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的难易程度存在分歧
summary: US President Donald Trump keeps repeating that the Strait of Hormuz — through which one fifth of the world’s oil and liquefied natural gas supplies normally flow — will reopen by Friday.

title: Ukraine and Moldova Start EU Membership Talks After Delay
title_cn: 乌克兰和摩尔多瓦推迟入盟谈判
summary: The European Union opened membership talks with Ukraine and Moldova after the new Hungarian government dropped its opposition, kickstarting a process that will likely take years to complete.

title: US, Iran to Sign Peace Deal in Switzerland on Friday
title_cn: 美国和伊朗将于周五在瑞士签署和平协议
summary: President Donald Trump says the Strait of Hormuz will be open by Friday. Officials say the US and Iran are due to sign their interim peace deal in Switzerland on Friday. For now, Trump is still at the G7 in France. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Secret Service Testing Face-Scanning App to Probe, Stop Threats
title_cn: 特勤局测试面部扫描应用程序以探测、阻止威胁
summary: The US Secret Service has begun using a face-scanning mobile phone application similar to a tool that federal immigration agents have for months wielded to identify people as part of a mass deportation effort.

title: US and Iran Reach Deal to Reopen Hormuz Strait This Week
title_cn: 美国和伊朗本周达成协议重新开放霍尔木兹海峡
summary: The US and Iran reached an interim peace agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and move further toward ending a 15-week war that’s wrought chaos across the Middle East and reverberated through the global economy.

title: SpaceX Euphoria Meets Geopolitical Relief
title_cn: SpaceX 的欣喜与地缘政治的缓解相结合
summary: SpaceX extends its post-IPO rally, while airline stocks take off as the US-Iran strike an interim agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Jefferies analyst Sheila Kahyaoglu joins "Bloomberg Open Interest" to break down the latest moves in aerospace and airlines. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Hormuz Wil Be Completely Opened on Friday
title_cn: 特朗普称霍尔木兹海峡将于周五完全开放
summary: US President Donald Trump says the Strait of Hormuz is already partially opened. He speaks during a bilateral meeting with French President Emmanuel Macron. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Iran Agreed to Not Have a Nuclear Weapon
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗同意不拥有核武器
summary: President Donald Trump talks about the new interim peace deal reached with Iran while meeting with the French president at the G7 summit. “The main thing is that Iran will not have a nuclear weapon. They fully agreed to that with strong policing powers, and they won’t have a nuclear weapon, which is what it was all about," Trump said. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: This Hated Corner of the Stock Market Is Yielding Big Returns
title_cn: 股市这个令人讨厌的角落正在带来丰厚的回报
summary: Laurence Hulse, founder and lead fund manager of Onward Opportunities, explains how he launched and grew a specialist UK small-cap investment trust despite one of the toughest environments in decades for both investment trusts and British equities. He shares his "gems among the rubble" approach to uncovering overlooked companies, discusses why UK small caps remain deeply undervalued and reveals how active engagement, artificial intelligence-powered research tools and intensive company analysis have helped his fund significantly outperform its peers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary Starts Unwinding Orban System With Term Limit, Clawback
title_cn: 匈牙利开始解除欧尔班制度的期限限制和回拨
summary: Hungary began dismantling former leader Viktor Orban’s self-styled illiberal rule by imposing term limits for premiers and winding up public trusts that wielded billions of dollars in assets in an extension of his political influence.

title: Europe Is Ready for Hormuz Mission Once Iran Peace in Place
title_cn: 一旦伊朗实现和平，欧洲已准备好执行霍尔木兹任务
summary: European leaders said they’re ready to deploy military assets to reopen the Strait of Hormuz once the peace agreement announced between the US and Iran is implemented.

title: Reform UK Vows to Hike Costs for Firms Employing Foreign Workers
title_cn: 英国改革计划誓言提高雇用外国工人的公司的成本
summary: A Reform UK government would make it more expensive for businesses to hire foreign workers by forcing them to pay a higher rate of payroll tax and a new levy for each overseas worker they employ.

title: Macron Brushes Off Trump’s 100% Tariff Threat on French Wine
title_cn: 马克龙否认特朗普对法国葡萄酒征收100%关税的威胁
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron refused to drop the country’s digital tax after Donald Trump threatened new tariffs on wine, setting the stage for a confrontation when the two leaders meet at the Group of Seven summit in Evian.

title: Trump Arrives for G7 Meeting in Evian
title_cn: 特朗普抵达埃维昂参加七国集团会议
summary: US President Donald Trump arrives at Geneva airport in Air Force One before boarding Marine One to join other heads of state at the Group of Seven summit in Evian, France. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nigeria’s ADC Taps Ex-Minister as Abubakar’s Running Mate
title_cn: 尼日利亚ADC任命前部长为阿布巴卡尔的竞选搭档
summary: African Democratic Congress, one of Nigeria’s major opposition parties, has selected former Transport Minister Chibuike Rotimi Amaechi as the running mate to its presidential candidate, Atiku Abubakar.

title: Czech Cabinet Backs Disputed Revamp of Public Media Funding
title_cn: 捷克内阁支持有争议的公共媒体资助改革
summary: The Czech government approved an overhaul of public media funding that critics say may reduce their independence and budgets.

title: EU and France to Sign €15 Billion Defense Deal Wednesday
title_cn: 欧盟和法国将于周三签署 150 亿欧元的防务协议
summary: The European Union and France will sign a €15.1 billion ($17.5 billion) loan agreement for defense on Wednesday, European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said.

title: Schumer Proposes Ex-Im Bank Revamp As Expiration Deadline Looms
title_cn: 随着到期期限的临近，舒默提议对进出口银行进行改革
summary: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and fellow Democrats are seeking to expand the US Export-Import Bank’s mission and subsidize more domestic production as talks heat up about the future of the financing agency ahead of a Dec. 31 deadline to keep its doors open.

title: Thousands of Public-School Staff Across US Face Layoff Warnings
title_cn: 美国数千名公立学校员工面临裁员警告
summary: Thousands of US public-school employees have received warnings saying they could lose their jobs as the nation’s education system grapples with mounting financial pressures.

title: Italy’s Meloni, Japan’s Takaichi Say GCAP Jet Program on Track
title_cn: 意大利 Meloni 和日本 Takaichi 表示 GCAP 喷气机项目已步入正轨
summary: Italian Premier Giorgia Meloni and Japanese Premier Sanae Takaichi said a key fighter-jet program remained on track, despite budget strains in the UK that threaten to slow progress on the trilateral project.

title: UK Seeks One of World’s Strictest Social Media Bans for Kids
title_cn: 英国寻求世界上最严格的儿童社交媒体禁令之一
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced what he described as a “full ban” on children using social media, going beyond limits imposed by Australia last year to create one of the strictest online crackdowns in the democratic world.
